appliedUpdates.description: Added documentation note: Double-buffer only provides throughput benefit when combined with set_stream_overlap_dispatch(True). Without stream overlap, it just alternates buffers without hiding latency.

Added documentation note: Dispatch path priority order determines which optimizations take effect. Higher-priority paths (graph, C dispatch) take precedence and can silently disable lower-priority optimizations like double-buffer.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add timeout guidance for long-running GPU tests to the kernel-optimization-worker skill. Full TP=4 tests take 10+ minutes due to weight loading and dispatch cache building. The skill's Step 6 (Run Correctness Tests) should mention: (1) Plan for 10-15 minute test duration for full model tests, (2) Consider lightweight test modes with fewer layers for faster iteration, (3) Use --minimal flag when available for quick validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript for overlap-double-buffer feature shows worker ran minimal test instead of full TP=4 test due to time constraints. The minimal buffer swap test validated the core mechanism, but full correctness test was deferred.

deltanet-batched-allreduce.reason: Proven infeasible during investigation. Cosine similarity ~0.68 (threshold 0.99). Root cause: FFN allreduces cannot be deferred because each layer's FFN depends on the allreduced hidden state from previous layers through the residual connection.
deltanet-batched-allreduce.keyFinding: Batched allreduce approach reduces call count from 128 to 96 per step (target met), but breaks correctness. The mathematical computation is fundamentally changed by deferring allreduces.

keyFindings: Double-buffer mechanism correctly implemented in _decode_step_cached_stream() and _decode_step_serial()
Minimal buffer swap test passed (validates alternation mechanism)
Full TP=4 correctness test not executed due to time constraints (test framework in place)
Double-buffer only works in cached+stream and serial dispatch paths, not in C dispatch or graph dispatch
nonBlockingIssues: Double-buffer mode not supported in C dispatch or graph dispatch paths
Final buffer read logic is implicit (after 64 even layers, d_hidden points to d_hidden_A)
Full TP=4 correctness test requires 10+ minutes to run
